privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wazuh_env automate_asset_inventory_export task. Verified that the data represents a default local Wazuh manager setup with no external real-world agent datasets. Confirmed all required parameters directly match the task description and verifier logic, including the target script name 'agent_reporter.py', output CSV 'active_agents.csv', expected CSV headers, API credentials ('wazuh-wui' / 'MyS3cr37P450r.*-'), and the target manager agent ID '000'.
